title: All of Create - NeoForge
description: Very very many Create Add-on Mods for NeoForge combined in one Modpack!
body:
# **All of Create - NeoForge**

This is a modpack containing very many mods and addons for Create (NeoForge - 1.21.1)

In this anything but lightweight modpack, I have combined around 200 Create add-ons. However, it must be said that I can play at a constant 50-60 FPS, which is the maximum Framerate on my office PC. If you like the Create mod and playing it with more possibilities to build factories for everything, this modpack is for you!

<details>
<summary>These mods are included:</summary>

- Create
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Create: Central Kitchen
- Create: Dreams & Desires
- Create: New Age
- Create Railways Navigator
- Create: Connected
- Create Stuff 'N Additions
- Create: Copycats+
- Create: Applied Kinetics
- CreateBetterFps
- Create Encased
- Create: Vibrant Vaults
- Create: Let The Adventure Begin
- _coming soon_

</details>

Report Issues on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/mZD8FnCJNc).
